title: taraxacum coryphorum
intro: Taraxacum coryphorum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family and is characterized by its smaller flower heads compared to the common dandelion. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum coryphorum include its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum coryphorum are available in tea, tincture, and capsule forms, and can be used to support overall health and well-being.
